page.content: In the Patent Expiry Impact Analysis for Merck & Co. as of December 2023, the report indicates various financial metrics for its pharmaceutical products in AUD. Drug A has an Amount of $150.5M, a YoY Change of -2.3%, a Market Share of 15.2%, and is assessed with a Low Impact. Drug B reports an Amount of $200.0M, a YoY Change of 5.0%, a Market Share of 18.7%, and is categorized under Moderate Impact.
